items.quote: RentalBasic is very intuitive and practical. The supplier search and filtering flow saved us from contacting vendors one by one.
items.author: RentalBasic Early User

items.quote: The app is cool and easy to explore, especially the location and filtering features. It already feels promising and useful for real event planning.
items.author: RentalBasic Early User

items.quote: The vendor public website and inventory browsing are excellent. The drag-and-drop status updates are neat and genuinely innovative.
items.author: RentalBasic Early User

items.quote: It served its purpose and the user experience was smooth. Dashboard, themes, real-time chat, and verification features are all strong foundations.
items.author: RentalBasic Early User

contactFooter.title: Let us build your next platform
contactFooter.description: Tell us your goals and we will recommend the right architecture, timeline, and implementation plan.

about.title: About
about.label: About Us
about.introLead2: We fix the ones slowing you down.
about.introPara1: At Avillanosa Information Technology Solutions, we work with businesses that are tired of doing things the hard way—manual processes, scattered tools, and workflows that break the moment you scale.
about.introPara2: We step in, clean it up, and build systems that actually hold.
about.introPara3: From internal tools to full platforms, we focus on one thing: making your operations run smoother, faster, and with less guesswork.
about.introPara4: Because good tech shouldn't impress you—it should quietly do its job so you can focus on yours.

who.label: Built for today's problems, not yesterday's standards
From custom systems to scalable platforms like RentalBasic

think.title: If it's manual, it's a problem
think.description: Repetition is a sign something should be automated.

think.title: Simple scales, complex breaks
think.description: We design for clarity first, growth second.

think.title: Build once, use daily
think.description: Real value comes from tools people actually rely on.

think.title: No dead features
think.description: If it doesn't serve a purpose, it doesn't get built.

think.title: Results over aesthetics
think.description: Nice UI is good. Working systems are better.

about.whyLead: Because too many businesses are running on spreadsheets, chat threads, and hope.
about.whySub: We replace that with systems you can trust.
